title: RPE1 subculture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e56se","text":"Guidance for subculture of RPE1 cells","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ql2e","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"egqhr","text":"Notes: warm reagents to 37oC before culturing ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":26,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3majr","text":"DPBS, no calcium, no magnesium (Gibco, 14190094)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d1aae","text":"Trypsin-EDTA (0.5%), no phenol red (Gibco, 15400054)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1v0d7","text":"-\u003e dilute to 0.05% in DPBS without calcium and magnesium for use","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bnlch","text":"Trypan blue (BIO-RAD, 1450021)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"crb36","text":"Cell Counting Slides for TC10‱/TC20‱ Cell Counter (BIO-RAD, 1450015)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":29,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":35,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"5j9ep","text":"CELL CULTURE FLASK, 50 ML, 25 CM² (Greiner, 690175)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"88nq","text":"CELL CULTURE FLASK, 250 ML, 75 CM² (Greiner, 658175)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9il9u","text":"CELL CULTURE FLASK, 550 ML, 175 CM² (Greiner, 660160)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7os8u","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aeg92","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"267BC4BA2FDA11EF83050A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"267BC4BA2FDA11EF83050A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: Remove media and wash 2x with DPBS without Ca2+ / Mg2+
Add trypsin-EDTA (0.05%; 300ul for T25, 1ml for T75, 2-3ml T175), rotate flask to ensure cell monolayer is covered
Incubate for approx. 5 min in cell incubator
Examine cells to ensure they are all detached, can gently tap side of flask to aid detachment

Resuspend in media (at least x2 trypsin vol for quenching) and either perform a cell count using trypan blue exclusion to determine cell number for seeding or take a pre-determined portion e.g between 1/10 and 1/15 for 3 day split or between 1/20 and 1/25 for 4 day split into flask of the same size
Transfer cells to a new flask with pre-warmed medium T25: 5ml T75: 12ml T175: 35ml
Repeat as appropriate e.g split every Monday and Thursday for 3 and 4 day split respectively
creator: Victoria Munro
